seoTitle: Koorooman vs Kooyong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Koorooman and Kooyong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Koorooman and Kooyong.
heading: Koorooman vs Kooyong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Koorooman, Victoria and Kooyong, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kooyong has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Koorooman (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Koorooman or Kooyong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Koorooman has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Kooyong scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Koorooman scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Kooyong scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Koorooman or Kooyong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kooyong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
